name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about hearing loss—did I mess up my claim?
description: Maybe—lawyer needed to fix any bad statements.[5]

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about hearing loss—did I mess up my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe—lawyer needed to fix any bad statements.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly if admitted fault or downplayed; statements can hurt.[5] Key factors: Adjusters minimize payouts, don't sign anything without review.[5] Request claim file copy, stop talking alone.[4] Lawyer reviews what you said, refiles stronger.[5]
